# Cogent Communications

## Cogent Communications's alternatives and competitors

See how Cogent Communications compares to similar products. Cogent Communications's top competitors include Lyntia Networks, TDC NET, and Meriplex.

Lyntia Networks Logo

Lyntia Networks engages as a wholesale optic fiber operator providing connectivity solutions for the telecommunications and cloud sectors. The company offers services i…

View more in-depth data on:

New call-to-action
TDC NET Logo [...] ### Top 10 Cogent Communications competitors

## Compare Cogent Communications to Competitors

Zayo Logo

Zayo provides international network connectivity services and fiber solutions within the telecommunications sector. The company offers services including dedicated internet access, internet protocol (IP) transit, and managed software-defined wide area network (SD-WAN), focusing on bandwidth and connectivity. Zayo serves sectors such as carriers, data centers, and educational institutions. It was founded in 2007 and is based in Boulder, Colorado.

Aryaka Logo [...] Cato Networks Logo

Cato Networks provides a unified service for enterprise security and network access through its Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) platform. The company offers solutions that include threat prevention, data protection, and incident detection and response, all integrated within a global cloud infrastructure. Cato Networks primarily serves sectors that require security measures and network optimization, such as regional and global enterprises. It was founded in 2015 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.

results.title: Cogent Communications Competitors | Comparably
results.content: Cogent Communications competitors include Verizon, Level 3 Communications, Cable One, Zayo Group and Lumen (formerly CenturyLink).

### R&B Industrial Supply Company

### EdgeNext

“Cogent provides a great balance of performance and cost-efficacy. Their extensive global backbone and reliable IP services have helped us scale quickly in key regions.” [...] - Matthew Fout, Network Engineer, Auto Approve

FirstWatch

“One of the great things that Cogent has brought us is our own peace of mind; that we are not wholly reliant on a single service and we have a backup we can rely on.”
